name: linear
description: Linear integration — fetch issues and projects through the plugin API proxy
author: zorai

token.label: Linear API Token
token.description: Linear API token used for authenticated GraphQL requests

body.query: query { issues(first: 1, filter: { identifier: { eq: "{{params.identifier}}" } }) { nodes { id identifier title description url priority state { name } project { name } team { key name } } } }
query { issues(first: {{default params.first "20"}}) { nodes { id identifier title url state { name } team { key } } } }
query { projects(first: {{default params.first "20"}}) { nodes { id name state url lead { name } } } }
query { issues(first: {{default params.first "20"}}) { nodes { id identifier title url state { name } team { key } } } }

query { issues(first: 1, filter: { identifier: { eq: "{{params.identifier}}" } }) { nodes { id identifier title description url priority state { name } project { name } team { key name } assignee { name } } } }

mutation { issueCreate(input: { teamId: "{{params.team_id}}", title: "{{params.title}}", description: "{{default params.description ""}}" }) { success issue { id identifier title url state { name } team { key } } } }
mutation { commentCreate(input: { issueId: "{{params.issue_id}}", body: "{{params.body}}" }) { success comment { id body url } } }
mutation { issueUpdate(id: "{{params.issue_id}}", input: { assigneeId: "{{params.assignee_id}}" }) { success issue { id identifier title assignee { name } url } } }
mutation { issueUpdate(id: "{{params.issue_id}}", input: { stateId: "{{params.state_id}}" }) { success issue { id identifier title state { name } url } } }

issue.description: Fetch Linear issue details by identifier

work.description: Fetch Linear issue details by identifier

transition.description: Move a Linear issue to a new state

connector.setup_hint: Add a Linear API token with issue read/write access in plugin settings.
